content.problemStatement:
**Problem Statement:Linear Search**.

Write a Python program to perform Linear Search on an array.
Given an array of integers and a target element, find the index position of the target element.

If the element is not found, return -1.


Input Format
First line contains an integer n — number of elements in the array.


Second line contains n space-separated integers.


Third line contains the target element to search.



Output Format
Print the index (0-based index) of the target element if found.


If not found, print -1.
